programme.title: Operation Carpetbagger: The Secret Mission to End World War II
programme.desc: Chronicling Operation Carpetbagger, one of the most top-secret missions of World War II.

programme.title: Heroes on Deck: World War II on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: The US Navy trained nearly 15,000 pilots on Lake Michigan from 1942-1945, resulting in the sinking of more than 100 classic World War II fighters and dive bombers.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Churchill: The Road to Victory
programme.desc: Winston Churchill served as the Prime Minister of Great Britain in arguably some of the most trying times of modern history. After Chamberlains resignation in 1940, Churchill was appointed during World War II and ultimately led the country down the road to victory.

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor Narrated by Tom Selleck
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941, Japanese planes dropped torpedoes and bombs on an American Pacific fleet at Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: The Strange World of the German Dictator
programme.desc: Explore the complexities of the man who would become one of historys most infamous figures. From his obscure beginnings in Austria to his meteoric rise as Germanys Fuhrer, dive deep into the forces that shaped Hitlers ideology and his leadership.

programme.title: Undermining the Nazis: Paris Secret Tunnels
programme.desc: Two men show extraordinary courage by secretly mapping Paris underground during the 1940 German occupation.

programme.title: Auschwitz in 33 Objects
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind the personal items and belongings left behind in Auschwitz Birkenau, a former nazi concentration and extermination camp and the worlds largest cemetery.

programme.title: Auschwitz in 33 Objects
programme.desc: A sobering look at some of the personal items and belongings left behind in Auschwitz Birkenau, a former Nazi concentration and extermination camp and the worlds largest cemetery.

programme.title: Auschwitz in 33 Objects
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind the personal items and belongings left behind in Auschwitz Birkenau, a former nazi concentration and extermination camp and the worlds largest cemetery.

programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Kenneth W. Rendells World War II memorabilia includes more than 6,000 original artefacts.

programme.title: The Mistake that Killed Hitler
programme.desc: In April 1945, as Stalins Red Army approach from the east and the western Allied forces quickly approach through France and Belgium, Adolf Hitler awaits his fate in his bunker, reflecting on the mistakes that lost him the war.

programme.title: Hitler: The Making of a Monster
programme.desc: From his humble upbringing in Austria to leading the Nazi Party, Hitlers life saw a reign of terror descend over Europe like never before.

programme.title: In Defence Of The Reich: HitlerS Atlantic Wall
programme.desc: In this documentary, in 1942, Hitler ordered the construction of extensive coastal defenses and fortifications.

programme.title: Ten Days to Victory
programme.desc: The unique stories of ten very different people who were caught up in the liberation of Europe from the grip of Nazi terror are interwoven .

programme.title: Ten Days to Victory
programme.desc: The stories of 10 very different people who were caught up in the liberation of Europe from the grip of Nazi Germany during the Second World War.

programme.title: Shanghai 1937: Where World War II Began
programme.desc: Exploring key figures of the Battle of Shanghai, how the battle unfolded over a three-month period and the years of war that followed, and the recollections of men and women who experienced these events as foreign children living in Shanghai.

programme.title: Undermining the Nazis: Paris Secret Tunnels
programme.desc: Two men show extraordinary courage by secretly mapping Paris underground during the 1940 German occupation.

programme.title: Auschwitz in 33 Objects

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: Archaeologists and scientists help to uncover the truth behind the deadly curses bestowed on the finders of some of the worlds most fascinating treasures.

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath investigates and explores the strange legends, unsolved mysteries, bizarre history, unusual traditions and eccentric people of Weird Britain.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Deep Sea Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Starting in Dorsets Studland Bay, Ross searches for wrecks that tell the story of D-Day and learns that winning wasnt just a case of superior power, but also ingenuity.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts follows the excavation of Iron Age Britains most spectacular grave. A team of archaeologists in East Yorkshire have uncovered the remains of only the third upright chariot burial ever found in Britain.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores Manchesters history of protest and revolution during the Industrial Revolution, from Marx to the Suffragettes and the Peterloo massacre.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts tells the story of Roman Britain by studying the history of Chester, Britains most Roman town.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate the British Empire?
programme.desc: Al and comedian Loyiso Gola embark on a road trip through South Africa to explore the UKs imperial history in the country, from colonial wars to the deals that eventually led to the development of apartheid.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.desc: From the Indian Oceans clear blue atolls to the icy waters of the St. Lawrence River, an epic expedition with the Cinemarine team to capture the remains of six of the worlds most spectacular underwater disasters.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: Stone Age Engineering and Battle of Bullecourt
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores 2018s best archaeological finds from the east of the UK: a monument as old as Stonehenge, a dig at the site of Britains first tank battle, and some disturbing Roman burials.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts follows the excavation of Iron Age Britains most spectacular grave. A team of archaeologists in East Yorkshire have uncovered the remains of only the third upright chariot burial ever found in Britain.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of his two cousins that died at sea in WWII, Ross Kemp explores captured German scout warship, the F2 and brings up treasure that could link back to his relatives.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The Kaiser Sunken Fleet: Ross Kemp continues his adventure in Scapa Flow, plunging down on the wrecks of a German warship and an experimental submarine aircraft called the M2. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores the English Civil War through the history of Oxford, the city at the heart of a battle between an autocratic king and his rebellious parliament.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice visits Canterbury for the story of Plantagenet England. Canterbury is steeped in history and the era of the Plantagenets - the strong house that held the English throne from 1154 until 1485 - saw the most dramatic episodes in the citys story.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes 45 miles through the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the areas rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At the impressively preserved Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps Tony relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. Tony finishes in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series Tony takes on a tough four-day trek through the Kintail region of the west Scottish Highlands to discover the story of the Jacobite uprisings of the early 1700s. On three occasions, Highland armies, assisted by the French and the Spanish, attempted to overthrow the King and put a Stuart back on the throne.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Focusing on Roman Britannia, where finds include the thickening mystery of 97 baby skeletons found by the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon that turns history on its head, and a Roman cult figure buried for 1700 years beneath a fort.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Viking Age in Britain and visits excavations that are revealing a different side to these seafaring pirates from Scandinavia. She looks for signs of the earliest Viking settlers in the Outer Hebrides, and in Orkney - where Viking dominance outlasted anywhere else in Britain - she visits the excavation of a Viking chiefs citadel and finds evidence of their way-of-life.

programme.title: Myths and Monsters
programme.desc: Revealing the strange Slavic story of Ivan and Koschei the Deathless, the origins of King Arthur and the wizard Merlin, the journey of Odysseus as he resists the beautiful song of the Sirens, and finally Sigurd and his battle with the dragon Fafnir.

programme.title: Myths and Monsters
programme.desc: Discovering the tragic Greek myth of Actaeon, who stumbled upon the goddess Artemis, along with the Celtic Otherworld, an idyllic place of magic and beauty, and hunting for the Kraken before venturing into the woods of the Brothers Grimm.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: Marrs Island, Nova Scotia was the site of one of the worst civilian maritime disasters in history, with more than 550 casualties. The team is diving in to search for answers to figure out how this tragic accident came to be.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: For more than 200 years, tales of a Phantom Ship have surrounded the waters of Pictou, Nova Scotia: a mysterious ship engulfs in flames and suddenly vanishes. Recently, a charred wooden wreck was discovered in the middle of Pictou Harbour.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on his most curious walk yet, across the ancient and turbulent kingdom of Northumbria. In the seventh century, at the height of the Dark Ages, the rule of Northumbria stretched from Edinburgh to York.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the wonderful seascapes of the North Norfolk coast and through one of the least developed spots in the country.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts catches up on ambitious plans to redevelop the site of a former school in Ebbw Vale in Wales, while Dion Dublin talks to a first-time developer planning to extend up and out at a semi in Bloxwich in the West Midlands.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Sutton in London, a studio apartment in Chatham in Kent and a terraced house in Middlesbrough are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A bungalow in Biggin Hill with huge potential, a centuries-old cottage in a beautiful part of Devon and an end terrace crying out for an upstairs bathroom are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell joins the team, and looks at an old mews house in an historic part of Litchfield in Staffordshire, while Martin Roberts assesses the potential of a bungalow in Hanley in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell looks at a large terraced house in Dover in Kent with bags of potential. Martin Roberts is in Camborne in Cornwall viewing a house with lots of issues. Dion Dublin meets a couple who bought a flat in Woodford Green in Essex.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell is in Gillingham in Kent meeting a couple embarking on their first renovation development, Martin Roberts talks to a man with ambitious plans for a house in Londons Chingford, and Dion Dublin looks round a semi in Wolverhampton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell hears development plans for a two-bedroom flat in Godalming in Surrey, Martin Roberts looks at a house in a terrible state of repair in Telford in Shropshire, and Dion Dublin sizes up the work needing to be done at a terraced house in Smethwick in the West Midlands.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat with great sea views in Margate in Kent, a bungalow in Whaley Thorns in Nottinghamshire and an end terrace in Longbridge in Birmingham are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A listed building in Brentwood in Essex dating back to the 16th-century is sold under the hammer, along with a flat in Halesowen in Birmingham and an end terrace in Northwood in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large semi in New Barnet in London is bought as an ambitious project to turn into a family home, a family do up a semi in Dover in Kent to make a profit, and two friends club together to try their hand at refurbishing a terraced house in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large Victorian semi packed full of original features in Dresden in Stoke-on-Trent, a two-bed semi in Croydon in London and some public loos in Kincardine in Fife are sold at auction. Martin, Dion and Martel meet the new owners and hear their plans for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A huge 1930s house in Kidderminster in Worcestershire, a purpose-built flat in a 1980s block in Wembley in North London, and a substantial Victorian semi in Burslem in Staffordshire are sold at auction.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: For four seasons fans of `Teen Mom watched Farrah, Maci, Amber and Catelynn face multiple challenges in their first years of motherhood, including such things as graduating from high school, relationships, getting jobs, beginning college and moving out on their own. Oh, and raising their first child. Now the original girls - hence, the `OG in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. Its an unprecedented view of young mothers facing the responsibilities of parenthood as their children enter kindergarten, start little league and reach other milestones of youth.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Playgroup play many games using a parachute.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit the Little Cars Play Centre where they get to drive little toy cars.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family hire a canoe from Miss Rabbit. They imagine they are in a jungle and then unexpectedly bump into Mrs Crocodile. Later on, Mr Lion invites them to have a picnic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The adventures of Peppa Pig and friends continue with more fun and games.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are going to the Water Park. Miss Rabbit is in charge. There are lots of fun things to do at the water park but first you need to put on your swimsuit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro loves superheroes. He has a superhero-themed party and Super Potato is one of the guests.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Peppa and her family go bowling at the Peppatown Bowling Alley.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is teaching the children a swimming lesson, They start out by swimming with floats tucked under their arms.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa Pig discovers what a cruise ship is, and goes on a cruise to a country called Greece.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There are lots of activities to do on the cruise, like breakfast at the pirate cafe. There, they meet Pirate Pete and Mrs Mermaid who invite everyone to their show.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its a snowy day and Peppas family build an igloo for their snowman. They hide in it during a snowstorm, but Penny Polar Bear and her parents love snowstorms - and also Peppas igloo!

programme.desc: Everyone prepares for Mr. Bull and Mrs. Cows wedding; Peppa and the soon-to-be-weds go to the jewellers to get rings, to the dress makers, to get a wedding dress and finally to Peppas house to sort the wedding cake.

programme.desc: Mom, Dad, Peppa and George decide to go to the beach on a beautiful sunny day. Suddenly, a little cloud covers the sun for a minute, but then it passes and the sun reappears.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cats Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings theyve done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard days work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesnt beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A storm cancels Peppa and her familys adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in their pool. They help the garden animals cool down but when it rains, the animals are happy and so is Peppa. Rain makes muddy puddles for jumping in!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are in Granny and Grandpa Pigs Garden. Grannys friends are playing folk music! They play music for Grandpa Pig and then Grandpa Pig makes apple juice for everyone!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is bedtime and Peppa calls Kylie Kangaroo and is surprised to learn that it is not morning or winter where she is! Daddy Pig explains this using a big ball to represent the Earth.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While visiting Suzy and Emilys house, Peppa is surprised that there are extra rules which she does not have in her own house. On the drive home, Peppa explains to Mummy Pig that different houses have different rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is confirming she is having a new baby. Mummy and Daddy Pig share the exciting news with Peppa and her brother, George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are on the search for a new home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family renovate their home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: With the building work complete, its time to decorate! Peppa and George have fun choosing how to decorate their new attic bedrooms. Its dinosaurs for George, but what will Peppa pick?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas family car breaks down. While it is being repaired, they borrow a shiny new one from Grandad Dogs garage.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig are taking Peppa and George to a festival - a jigsaw festival! Peppa is amazed by all of the completed jigsaws around the festival.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is making a wicker basket. She explains it is her hobby - something you do to relax. The children discuss hobbies and learn about each others favourite things to do.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Peppa are at Granny Pigs house. They find Mummys old patchwork quilt that Granny made for her as a baby. Peppa decides shed like to make one for the baby!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is out with Suzy and Granny Sheep in Mummy Sheeps car. They come across an old van that Miss Rabbit is recycling. Granny Sheep decides she would like to turn it into an art van.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Sheep is driving Vanessa, the art van along the road with Peppa, Suzy, Pedro, Mandy, Molly and Danny. They are taking her to Grampy Rabbits boat yard, for her first-ever outing!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While Mummy and Daddy Pig attend a refresher antenatal class, Peppa and George join Miss Rabbits Sibling School where they learn about what to expect when their new sibling arrives.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is determined to find the perfect name for the baby.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The nurse is popping around, and she decides that todays visit should be all about how to hold a baby. The nurse shows Peppa a special way for a small person to safely hold a baby.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a day out with her family, Peppa is encouraged to find words to describe the different kinds of puddles they find.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse joins Peppas playgroup. She uses a wheelchair and is super sporty. The children have a lot of fun playing together.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children how to play the recorder. They practise a lot at home, then put on a performance for all the parents to enjoy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to go to her relaxation class, but relaxing proves more difficult than expected. However, thanks to Daddy Pigs bouncy castle, they all have fun in the end.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig is given a parking ticket, Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children - and that they get told off too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A new synthesiser arrives for Daddy Pig, and his family collect sounds for it from around the house while he is out at work.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: During a picnic in her garden, cousin Chloe shows Peppa and George fun things to do with flowers.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Rebecca and Richard Rabbit are playing a marble run game at Peppas house. But when Daddy Pig joins in and improvises tunnels and bridges, the marble rolls out of the bedroom, causing chaos and nearly knocking Goldie out of her bowl.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When George loses the metal wind-up key for his toy robot in the long grass, Grandpa Pig cannot find his metal detector to help George track it down.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: For World Book Day, the playgroup must dress up as a character from their favourite book. But Peppa cant decide which as she has so many favourites.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy all go on a lovely trip to the childrens festival. There is lots to see and do, including singing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Day two at the festival and it has rained all night. The festival is very muddy and Peppa is thrilled. Luckily, it rains every year and Miss Rabbit is prepared with lots of muddy activities.

programme.desc: Peppa and the gang sail on a canal boat.

programme.desc: Peppa and George explore the greenhouse, and it is full of lovely tomatoes and basil. When its time for dinner, Granny Pig takes all the ingredients they have grown and makes a tasty salad.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but when he keeps getting stuck in the mud, they all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit. Molly shows them how good she is at digging while taking them on a tour of her underground house.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its Richard Rabbits birthday party and George is invited. That can only mean one thing - soft play! George and friends have great fun, swinging, bouncing and climbing, but it isnt quite as much fun for the grown-ups!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family take a trip to the market to buy some apples, cheese and fish. However, they get more than they were expecting when they stop by Mr Foxs stall - he is selling some extra special items!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family travel to Paris to visit Delphine and her relatives. The donkeys take Peppa and her family to the top of the Eifel Tower, forcing Dad to face his fear of heights.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Grandpa Pig to dig a new pond for his garden. While digging, they find hidden treasure so they go to see Mr. Richard in the museum.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Georges toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys, so Mummy Pig decides it is time to order a new toy cupboard. The cupboard arrives in the post but it needs to be assembled - and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not very good at DIY. Luckily help is at hand, as Mr Zebra the Postman loves assembling flat pack furniture.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its time for playgroup, and Peppa and friends are thinking about what they want to be when they grow up. Some in the group want to be nurses, police officers and even pirates, but Peppa takes a little while to figure out what she wants to be.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The doctor teaches children what to do when there is an accident. A patient soon appears and they put into practise the new techniques they have learned.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Tiddles gets stuck in a tree and needs to be rescued. When the turtle falls on Pedros nose, he needs to go to the doctors to make sure everything is ok.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Detective introduces his new friend, the superhero Super Potato who teaches children the importance of eating fruits and vegetables every day, and later helps the Detective out of a complicated situation.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a beautiful sunny day, Grandpa takes Peppa and George to spend the day sailing. After an accident, the boat ends up sinking, and now they need rescuing with a hovercraft.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa wins her first star for making a wonderful drawing of her house. Dad realises that he has never won a single star and is determined to solve the problem.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and its a chance to see all sorts of exciting things! There is Mr. Bulls Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen and even a very special appearance from Mr. Potato.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family have all gone to the caves for a day out and Grampy Rabbit is their tour guide! Peppa and George are excited to see the pretty caves and go through the underground lakes. Daddy Pig must be at his bravest on this trip to go on the scary `Ride of Doom!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig show and share with Peppa and George their toys and hobbies. Granny her special doll from childhood and Grandpa his love of building toy planes. Peppa and George have great fun when Grandpa reveals his new biggest plane ever that even George can fit in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbits clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes. After trying on lots of new exciting outfits George finds an outfit that suits him just right!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig have gone to visit Madame Gazelle. The family soon realise that her house is being pushed over by the tall tree next to it. Mr. Bull arrives and with his help they all manage to save Madame Gazelles House and tree.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete. Peppa, Mummy and George all decide to go with Daddy and enjoy a train journey, where they sing to pass the time and even have a sleep on the train.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Sheep gets the news that she has got a new job far away, leaving Suzy and Peppa to wonder how theyre going to carry on being best friends; Peppa gives Suzy some presents to remember her by, before a surprising change for Mummy Sheep changes everything.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its time for a day out and Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig and Suzy Sheep all go to visit Tiny Land. They see tiny dinosaurs, their favourite tiny landmarks and even a tiny Miss Rabbit doing even more jobs!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa and Suzy learn that grown ups must work all day, they decide to play at working in a shop. They quickly find it is very tiring.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spot a rainbow when they go for a drive.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro gets a cough at playschool and the other children soon catch it. Doctor Brownbear is called and gives them horrible medicine, but who will look after him when he is ill?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go on holiday in a special van. Peppa is surprised to find that at a push of a button the van turns into a little house for them to sleep in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are on holiday in their camper van. They decide to go to Duck Land, a special park where they can see the ducks in the river, and are surprised when their van turns into a boat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pigs compost heap. Worms inside the bin turn the peelings into compost, which Granny and Grandpa use to help their plants grow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, while Suzy Sheep plays with Peppa. The boys dont want to play the same games as the girls, but they all agree that they like jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig finds it hard work when he runs a race to raise money for the school roof. It is far easier to run when a wasp is chasing him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in too - which turns Daddys shirt pink.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig, but they must send Polly Parrot for help when their boat runs aground. Polly fetches Granny Pig and Granddad Dog to rescue them.

programme.desc: Delphine the Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to playgroup, where they teach her the `Bing Bong Song.

programme.desc: Peppa brings home a teddy from playgroup to look after, but she is worried that he will not have a very exciting time.

programme.desc: It is Danny Dogs birthday, and with the help of Grandad Dog and Grandpa Pig the children take part in a pirate treasure hunt.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her friends on a train ride where they must tick off what they see on their activity sheets.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig shows Peppa and George her poultry. Elsewhere, something has been eating Grandpa Pigs lettuces.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: At Peppas playgroup, Madame Gazelle wants everyone to show the class their special talent.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas family go to the museums moon exhibition with Georges friend, Edmond Elephant.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the childrens rules.

programme.desc: Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food. Peppa, George, and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelles playschool.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is poorly in hospital.

programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.desc: Miss Rabbit gives Mummy Pig, Peppa and George a ride in her rescue helicopter. Daddy Pig is very sad to escape all the fun - but Miss Rabbit makes sure that doesnt happen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Baby Alexander is too young to talk, until Peppa teaches him his first word.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbits lighthouse.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a Secret Club - going on secret missions, and doing secret things, but soon everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbits Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gives the class a music lesson. Theres lots of crashing and banging at first, but its not long before the grown-ups visit and lay down some notes of their own.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to play with Cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children dont want to play any `baby games.

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the children to Grampy Rabbits gym class, where they learn how to be real explorers.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family collect apples and blackberries in Granny and Grandpa Pigs garden to make a pie.

programme.desc: Some of Daddy Pigs important work papers have gone missing - because Mummy Pig, Peppa and George have accidentally made them into paper aeroplanes.

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephants birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than theyd thought.

programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a new theme park where there is lots of fun to be had with vegetables.

programme.desc: Peppa and George are taken to visit the home that Mr Bull is building. Will they find out who their new neighbours are going to be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy teaches the children how to play basketball, and it is not long before they are good enough to take on a much bigger team.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is much excitement when Mr Zebra delivers a package from Aunt Dottie for Peppa and George.

programme.desc: Dr Hamsters pet tortoise Tiddles gets stuck up a tree. Who is going to come to the rescue?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Mr Foxs Shop to buy Granny and Grandpa an anniversary present, but what will they choose from the shop that sells everything?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and all her friends at playgroup dress up as different countries from all over the world.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy teaches Peppa and George a fun game to play while they wait inside for the rain to stop.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is excited when Mummy Rabbit arrives with a big tummy and they learn that she is carrying a baby bunny inside - but it turns out they are in for an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro Pony pretends he is a proper cowboy, telling everyone stories in the camp he has set up in the garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig pops round with some seeds for Peppa and George to plant, with Daddy Pig helping out - by acting as a scarecrow.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and hes bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Foxs birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddys birthday treat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story to help them fall asleep. When George wakes up again, Peppa has to make up a bedtime story to get him back to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have been on a trip to a mountain beauty spot. When Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a drain, Mr Bull offers to find them with his digger.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George pays a visit to Mr Foxs Shop after his favourite toy, Mr Dinosaur, breaks. With all the additional features, surely Dino Roar is a good replacement?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Pigs Train to the Rescue
programme.desc: Oh dear! Miss Rabbits train has broken down and all her passengers need to get to work. So Grandpa Pig lends Miss Rabbit his little train, Gertrude.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Playgroup is having a pet competition and everyone has brought their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge, but it is so hard to choose the best pet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Eek! Theres a spider in the house. Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it. Mr Skinny-Legs is set free in the garden, where he can spin all the webs he likes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas family is staying at Cousin Chloes house. Its been a long day and everyone is tired and sleepy, but baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig is really pleased with all the plastic gnomes and wishing well shes got for the garden. Peppa and George love them too, but Grandpa Pig wishes they would all disappear.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Oh no! The childrens favourite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving Playgroup. They are very sad to be losing her, but decide to throw a leaving party to give her a good send-off.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: From Berneray to Pabbay: The Riddle of the Sands
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island odyssey, exploring the remote and fascinating places which scatter our coastline, and meeting the people who call these islands home. On this Grand Tour, Paul is exploring a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides. Lying just off the North Uist coast is princely Berneray, where his journey begins. From there he heads south to capture the colours of Grimsay, and then weaves through the marram grass of Kirkibost, to end on the deserted whisky island of Pabbay.

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, and their arrival kickstarted the Industrial Revolution. The team search for artefacts from the countrys first superhighway - the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761.

programme.title: Battle of Okinawa in Colour
programme.desc: WWII in Europe was largely filmed in black-and-white, but in the Pacific, American cameramen filmed everything in colour.This documentary uses their footage to tell the story of the fight for Okinawa,the last great battle of the Pacific War.

programme.title: Waco: The Longest Siege
programme.desc: A gun battle between government agents and Branch Davidians leads to one of the longest standoffs in American history; the story behind the siege features new footage and firsthand accounts from survivors, law enforcement agents and eyewitnesses.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: The wreck of the heavy cruiser USS Indianapolis, which sank during World War II, is discovered 18,000 feet below the Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Rush - The Rise Of Kings
programme.desc: Through a stunning combination of rare footage and insider insight this film traces the complete history of Rush.

programme.title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring (Nurburgring), Rock Im Park (Nuremberg) is a music festival that takes place annually at the Nurburgring Race Track in Western Germany. Featuring Depeche Mode.

programme.title: David Gilmour: Remember That Night
programme.desc: David Gilmour presents live tracks from the album "On an Island" and some hits from Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Yes - Songs From Tsongas 35th Anniversary
programme.desc: Songs From Tsongas is a live performance from Yes 35th Anniversary Tour in 2004, the last tour by the band to feature the classic line-up of Jon Anderson, Steve Howe, Chris Squire, Rick Wakeman and Alan White.

programme.title: Red Hot Chili Peppers: Live at Tokyo Dome 2023
programme.desc: Red Hot Chili Peppers perform after the return of John Frusciante, who is in Japan for the first time in 16 years.

programme.title: Snow Patrol - Live at Somerset House
programme.desc: Performing live for the first time with a string section, this amazing Snow Patrol concert, features all the key hits including Run, Spitting Games, Chocolate and a blistering version of Tiny Little Fractures.

programme.title: The Cure: Eurockeennes 2012
programme.desc: The legendary rock band The Cure hits the stage at Eurockeennes in Belfort, in 2012.

programme.title: The Killers - Live at Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: The Killers perform at Rock Am Ring, a music festival that takes place annually at the Nurburgring Race Track in Western Germany, with tracks like When You Were Young and The World We Live In.

programme.title: The Offspring: Rock AM
programme.desc: The Offspring is an American rock band from California; originally formed under the name Manic Subsidal, the bands lineup consists of lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist Dexter Holland, bassist Todd Morse and lead guitarist Kevin Wasserman.

programme.title: Metallica - Orion Festival: Tour Through the Never
programme.desc: Metallica performs their top tracks, including "Master of Puppets and One", "Sad But True", and "Seek and Destroy", at the Orion Festival in Atlantic City.

programme.title: The Offspring: Rock AM
programme.desc: The Offspring is an American rock band from California; originally formed under the name Manic Subsidal, the bands lineup consists of lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist Dexter Holland, bassist Todd Morse and lead guitarist Kevin Wasserman.

programme.title: Billy Talent: Live at Festival Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: The Canadian rock band Billy Talent performs as part of the annual Rock Am Ring festival at Nurburgring Race Track in western Germany.

programme.desc: The Canadian rock band Billy Talent performs as part of the annual Rock Am Ring festival at Nurburgring Race Track in western Germany.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Fuzz are staying local, visiting Francis farm in Oxfordshire. Theres tractors, bikes and trinkets.

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: How Its Made

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: A mother and daughter bring in a stuffed tortoise that has been in the family for 44 years. Plus, a woman brings in a chair that belonged to her mother.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: Skilled craftspeople are bringing Drew Pritchards finds back to life. With demanding customers and high turnover, their hard work turns trash to treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Prices at an amusement park in Berkshire causes great merriment. Plus, Drew gets a lesson in dentistry from an antiques shop in Newcastle and flips a coin on a deal in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Permit delays ruin the Poseidon Crews hopes of a massive payday on their famed ground. A torrential downpour forces Shane and Russell to evacuate their dig site.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Jacqui and Andrew are targeted by potential gold thieves while Marcus and Linden hunt ground close to the site of the biggest nugget ever found in Western Australia.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the worlds rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: A lack of water sends Max and Glenn out into the wilderness to hunt sapphires. Anthony and Jodie take a massive wrong turn underground, and the Richardsons big machines bring on big problems.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds a 914 in a barn. Under the muck he can see a profit in the 1970s sports car, so he buys it for a bargain price. Can Edd restore it to a saleable condition?

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: The pursuit of profit sees Henry and Fuzz rummaging through Rebecca and Sues sheds near Newark. Its home to all manner of vehicles and parts.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Motorcycle fanatic Henry Cole travels around the country with his mechanic mate Fuzz Townshend nosing around peoples sheds and garages in the hope of finding some automotive bargains.

programme.title: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Fuzz Townsend are back on the road, but this time theyre looking for iconic vintage vehicles to restore and sell for a tidy profit.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Sunshine Superman: The Story of Donovan
programme.desc: Containing classic 60s film and TV appearances, rare archive footage and never-before-seen material, follow the ultimate story of the folk-pop phenomenon.

programme.title: Hounds of War
programme.desc: A mercenary seeks revenge after his entire team gets wiped out during a final mission.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Fast Cars
programme.desc: Gear up for upcoming blockbuster Fast X and buckle in for a countdown of the best cars from each of the Fast and Furious films, from Brians Toyota Supra to Doms Dodge Charger.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as theyre pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venoms home world.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One mans brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after its revealed hes a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Diana, princess of the Amazons, is raised to be an unconquerable warrior on a sheltered island paradise. She discovers her full powers and true destiny after leaving home to join the fight to end all wars.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains -- just who is running the government?

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: An ordinary cabbie uses gadget-laden formal wear to combat a villain who wants to poison the worlds water supply.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR drivers cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Knockabout comedy set in the sexist world of 1970s newscasting. Ron Burgundy, San Diegos top-rated anchorman, reigns supreme in the all-male world of television news, until the arrival of an ambitious female reporter upsets the status quo. When she steps in to present the programme in Rons absence, an uncivil war breaks out in the newsroom.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Ron Burgundy tries to stay classy when he and his team take New York and the nations first 24-hour global cable news network by storm.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: Between the Temples
programme.desc: A cantor in a crisis of faith finds his world turned upside down when his grade school music teacher reenters his life as his new adult bat mitzvah student.

programme.title: Between the Temples
programme.desc: A cantor in a crisis of faith finds his world turned upside down when his grade school music teacher reenters his life as his new adult bat mitzvah student.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. However, his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what was lost.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Set to his most beloved songs, its the epic musical story of Elton John, his breakthrough years in the 1970s and his fantastical transformation from shy piano prodigy to international superstar and pop icon.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Faced with a tight budget, a baseball manager and his partner recruit bargain bin players that scouts have labelled as flawed, but have game-winning potential.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Chicago teen Ren and his family move to the small midwestern town of Bomont, where rock music has been banned.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. However, his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what was lost.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: Batteries not Included
programme.desc: A group of New York tenement dwellers face eviction and receive help from an unlikely source. Just when it seems that nothing short of a miracle will save their homes, a miracle is just what they get in the shape of tiny visitors from outer space whose magical powers have the bad guys on the run.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: 10 Lives
programme.desc: A pampered cat takes for granted the lucky hand he has been dealt after he is rescued and loved by Rose, a kind-hearted and passionate student. When he loses his ninth life, fate steps in to set him on a transformative journey.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A domesticated terrier and his unruly canine pal encounter a rebellious bunny and his gang of abandoned pets.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Max the terrier encounters canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a scary turkey when he visits the countryside. Luckily for Max, he soon catches a break when he meets Rooster, a gruff farm dog who tries to cure the lovable pooch of his neuroses.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRAs Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit
programme.desc: Tongue-in-cheek tale about a high-speed car chase across America involving a sheriff and a bootlegger with crash stunts galore. All goes well for the Bandit as he drives from Texas to Georgia with a truckload of illicit beer until he stops to pick up a damsel in distress, who also happens to be the sheriffs daughter.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five school kids - an athlete, a spoiled rich kid, a brainy nerd, an introverted loner and a rebellious punk - are brought together on a day-long detention where they break the rules, bare their souls and find they have more in common than just attending the same high school.

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off
programme.desc: A teen perpetrates a series of elaborate deceptions to ensure that he and two friends spend a carefree day in Chicago.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Combat Machines

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Bao Baos Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Bao Bao the panda and Cassandra the crane are best friends. When Cassandra announces that autumn is almost here and she will soon leave, Bao Bao is upset at her imminent departure and prepares himself for life without her. Bao Bao learns that Cassandra is only leaving for the winter months, and he should make the most of her company while he can.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Savannah Craze
programme.desc: Doris the duck is fed up of always playing the same old games with her friends. She wants to invent a new and fun game they can all play but her other friends are reluctant to join in. She heads off on her own, and soon the other animals are intrigued by the strange bouncy boingy noises that can be heard across the savannah.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a Long Night in the Jungle
programme.desc: Giggles and Tickles are so excited about their birthday the next day that they vow to stay up all night long so that they dont miss a single moment of it. The other animals on the savannah are tired and soon go to bed. Can the mischievous monkeys find ways to keep themselves awake all night and still enjoy their birthday?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Ronald and His Boulders

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the House of Leaves

When the house of leaves comes crashing down, Nelson wastes no time in telling Nigel off.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

The other animals advise Gertie against the trip, since pandas are not renowned for their climbing skills. Will Gertie and Bao Bao prove the others wrong, or will they need some help from their friends?

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: In his mid-eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the depths of the Great Barrier Reef to the ancient rainforests of Borneo, following his adventure across the globe.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David descends beneath the waves at night in the state of the art Triton submersible, the first of its kind to visit the reef. He meets some of the tiny coral animals that built the reef and helped to turn it into an underwater wonderland.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David continues his exploration of the Great Barrier Reef, aboard the research vessel the Alucia. He discovers the incredible animals that visit the reef every year, from birds to whales, some travelling thousands of kilometres to get there.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David examines what the next few decades hold for this remarkable community of animals, as well as what is being done to save it.

programme.desc: A rogue insurgent assassinates foreign journalists and makes it look like the CIA is responsible. Coaxed out of retirement to clear the agencys name, a deadly operative must confront his checkered past while unraveling an international conspiracy.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica is a biodiversity hotspot that hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But in this undersea jungle, the oceans top predators, sharks, are at risk, threatened by loss of habitat and overfishing.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Australias birds of prey are some of the regions fiercest predators. These highly specialised killers are powerful, resourceful, striking and use some impressive weapons to survive.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Journey into impenetrable jungle, dive deep into mysterious underwater caves and wade through lush everglades that shelter Mexicos largest predator, the Morelets crocodile.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Woolly monkey Piquita requires an operation, new capuchin Louis gets a lovely perch, while the chimp team find themselves trying to navigate a double blow after two sad losses.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison visits Twycross Zoo to collect an orphaned orangutan in need of a new home, plus there is some startling news about a capuchin recently rescued from a life in the pet trade.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Wild Coast of South Africa is comprised of rivers that empty into the sea and indigenous forest.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species and this time we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: Unmask the eerie beauty of swamplands, which have inspired centuries of folklore and serve as a vital link between life and death. Swim with hungry crocodiles, see deer gamble with their lives for food, and watch carnivorous plants snap up prey.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Their ancestors were the first vertebrates to colonise dry land and frogs inhabit every continent except Antarctica, but their world is rapidly changing. What was once wetlands are now playgrounds, golf courses and race tracks.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Join a line of hermit crabs as they prepare for a very orderly house swap on a beach in Belize, and meet a chimpanzee in Senegal who has found a genet cat to keep as a pet.

programme.desc: Max is on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some animals.

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: Scientists from around the world reveal what make sharks the oceans ultimate predators.

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: Meet the nomadic sharks thriving in the oceans depths, a lone blue shark in the Atlantic and hundreds of hammerheads in the Pacific.

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: Sharks have adapted to thrive in extreme places, is there anywhere they cant survive?

programme.title: Leopard Dynasty: The Rise of Rana
Secret Life of the Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: A two-year-old Tasmanian Devil named Carlos looks for food and fights for dominance.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: March is the breeding month of the Devils, and the pregnancy lasts about eighteen days. The litter is usually about twenty but there are only four nipples, to which the first pups will arrive, and the rest will die.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough charts the story of animals who defy gravity, starting with the planets first flyers: the insect.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: After meeting some critters who glide through life in Borneo, Sir David Attenborough decides to turn back the clock.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: In the final episode in the series, Sir David Attenborough turns his attention to the creatures that dominate our skies today.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Australia is home to the worlds most toxic, venomous and dangerous creatures. From the oceans to the forest, swamps and deserts, its a continent teeming with a hugely disproportionate number of creatures that can bite, poison or maim.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: With the Hollywood lionesses hiding in the north, the four nomadic males turn south. Nathan Pilcher captures the Nomads attempt at a pride take over, which sends the MK lions running for their lives.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: There are clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. There is a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound and a honey badgers dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Going up against some of Australias wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals and looking into whether these weapons, such as the kangaroos deadly boxing moves, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates the life story of Jumbo the elephant, the celebrity animal superstar who is said to have inspired the movie `Dumbo. Attenborough joins a team of scientists and conservationists to unravel the story of Jumbo.

programme.title: Miracle at Medinah: The Story of 2012 Ryder Cup
programme.desc: Europes 12 Ryder Cup heroes tell the story of their incredible win in Chicago. Trailing the USA by ten points to six with just the Sunday Singles left to play, Jose Maria Olazabals team pulled off the biggest comeback win away from home in the history of the Ryder Cup. This is a detailed account of the `Miracle at Medinah, as told by the players themselves and their inspirational captain.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Eleanor and Rob from Hereford would love an eco-friendly garden for themselves and their two daughters to enjoy. Of primary importance to the couple is that their garden is low/no carbon and that it is friendly to the environment. They would like the garden build to be based on a `circular economy ie. any carbon spent would be offset by reusing materials. They want lots of habitats for birds, butterflies and bees and to use as many natural materials as possible.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Olivia and Alex have just got engaged and bought their first home. As a generous wedding gift, their parents have decided to fund the garden renovation. As they are providing the dosh, it will be up to them to choose the winning design. Olivia describes their current garden as a tidy mess. The uneven back portion is an eyesore, and they dislike the straight, purposeless path.

programme.desc: Simon visits Istanbul, the beaches and crystal clear waters of the Aegean Sea, before ending up at the war torn border with Syria. He meets a producer now trying to sell wine in a Muslim country with an increasingly conservative government.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon is in the United States travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In wide open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long term decline in the rural economy but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land.

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Its Christmas in the nations favourite corner shop, but some of Granvilles most important customers have plans to leave town. Granville has to use some of his craftiest wiles to persuade everyone not to travel at Christmas.

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville has a large quantity of bargain spectacles to sell. Meanwhile, encouraged by reading a self-help book, Mr Newbold decides to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about their relationship, Eric tries to persuade Kath to go on a camping holiday and what is in the large, heavy box that has arrived for Leroy?

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville creates a blend of snuff and has to give the Black Widow a crash course in cycling proficiency. The ladies get dressed up for line dancing and Gastric goes on a diet. Meanwhile, Mr Newbold is being furtive and thinks hes found a pastime to share with Mrs Rossi.

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright advertises for a live-in housekeeper and outsells a Hoover salesman.

programme.desc: Mike approaches Alison to discuss their finances following the loss of their BandB business. However, Alison is more preoccupied with plotting revenge on the Ghosts for April Fools Day and recruits a playful Humphrey to execute her plans. But who will prove the hardest to fool? Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice?
